definitions: to present or proffer (something) for acceptance or rejection.
to make available for sale, lease, or use.
to propose or put forward for consideration.
to make a sacrifice or an oblation to a deity.
to present oneself as a candidate for a position or task.
examples: They decided to offer him the job.
The company will offer new products next quarter.
He wanted to offer his help.
She plans to offer herself for the volunteer position.
